executionModelDetail: Direct in-session CI-pipeline change, parent-expanded by bubbles.workflow because the active workflow runtime lacked the runSubagent tool (the established pattern for specs 085/089/097 in this repo). All phases were authored/executed directly with real evidence recorded in report.md.
completionNote: SCOPE-01 (release-gate build-clients + skip-tolerant publish-build-manifest + success-gated clients block in .github/workflows/build.yml, plus the lockstep drift-detector contract test) and SCOPE-02 (docs/Deployment.md server-only manifest + knb-gate contract) are complete, committed (spec(098) commit f7148da2, pushed to origin/main), and certified done on the in-repo drift-detector proof: 12/12 internal/deploy contract tests GREEN (SCOPED_UNIT_EXIT=0) incl. 6 spec-098 tests with 3 adversarial workflow-shape probes, CHECK_EXIT=0, LINT_EXIT=0 (re-run this session). The live CI run on main is RED at a FOREIGN, pre-existing gate (build-images -> Trivy vulnerability scan -- smackerel-ml, run 27865311625; identical failure on pre-098 run 27856198803), unrelated to spec 098's changed surface; because build-images fails upstream the publish-build-manifest path was not live-exercised. That is dispositioned as a separate ops/security concern in report.md Discovered Issues and is NOT a 098 blocker. 098 is certified on the in-repo contract proof (the established pattern for CI-config specs). No fabrication: the live green run is honestly recorded as a pending operator-observable follow-up. UPDATE 2026-06-22 (cosmetic CI-state reconciliation by bubbles.docs, text-only): the foreign Trivy-ml CVEs were remediated by commits 4debc4f0 + d684f7bc (merged to main); the build workflow is now GREEN on HEAD (latest main runs completed success, e.g. run 27925329084 on 2026-06-22) and publish-build-manifest publishes the server-only manifest, so the server-only-manifest path is now exercised. Status and certification fields are unchanged by this note.

simplify.reason: Single additive CI-workflow gate (4 if-guards + 1 workflow_dispatch input + lockstep test); no new job/step/script/parser and no abstraction to collapse. Nothing to simplify.

gaps.reason: Every FR (FR-098-01..07) and scenario (SCN-098-A01..A04) is covered by the drift-detector contract test including the 3 adversarial workflow-shape probes; no coverage gap.

harden.reason: spec/design/scopes are coherent and traceable (G068 + traceability-guard green); an additive workflow gate needs no further hardening rounds.

stabilize.reason: Static YAML plus a deterministic Go contract test; no time/network/ordering nondeterminism and no flakiness surface.

chaos.reason: No runtime service to fault-inject for a static CI-config change; the abuse-probing is the contract test's 3 adversarial sub-tests, each stripping one guard (release-gate, skip-tolerance, success-gate) and proving rejection.

executionHistory.expansionReason: The active workflow runtime lacked the runSubagent tool, so bubbles.workflow parent-expanded the planning phases and authored the artifacts directly.
executionHistory.note: Verified the coupling solution-blind (build.yml publish-build-manifest needs build-clients with no guard; build-clients fail-fasts on ANDROID_KEYSTORE_BASE64; specs 087/088/089 confirm SKIPPED manifest), and the clients-absent precedent (build-home-lab.sh local-build-manifest + dual-shape promote_manifest_parse.sh). Authored spec.md (FR-098-01..07, SCN-098-A01..A04), design.md (Current-Truth map + 3-way design fork resolved to release-gating + skip-tolerance + success-gate, GitHub Actions needs/skip semantics, contract-test design, knb-side contract), and scopes.md (SCOPE-01 workflow+test, SCOPE-02 docs).

executionHistory.expansionReason: The active workflow runtime lacked the runSubagent tool, so bubbles.workflow parent-expanded the implement phase and wrote the changes directly.
executionHistory.note: build.yml: +workflow_dispatch input build_clients (default false); +build-clients.if release gate (startsWith refs/tags || build_clients=='true'); +publish-build-manifest.if skip-tolerant guard (server-side success + build-clients success|skipped); +3 step-level if needs.build-clients.result=='success' on the client-digest steps. Contract test build_workflow_clients_contract_test.go updated in lockstep: corrected the build-clients ] marker message, added assertConditionalClientsDecoupling + assertManifestClientsPolicy + 6 spec-098 tests (1 live, 2 policy, 3 adversarial). docs/Deployment.md: +server-only manifest subsection incl. knb E025-CLIENT-MANIFEST-NO-DIGEST expectation.

executionHistory.expansionReason: The active workflow runtime lacked the runSubagent tool, so bubbles.workflow parent-expanded the test/validate phases and ran the suites + guards directly.
executionHistory.note: Ran the contract tests via ./smackerel.sh test unit --go --go-run. First run surfaced one over-strict TEST message assertion (TestClientsDecoupling_AdversarialUngatedClientBuild expected 'release intent' but the contract correctly rejected via the unique github.event.inputs.build_clients marker because a pre-existing tag-gated step also matches startsWith refs/tags) — fixed the assertion to match the 'release' token; the contract function itself was already correct. Re-run GREEN: internal/deploy ok, 12/12 tests pass, SCOPED_UNIT_EXIT=0. CHECK_EXIT=0, LINT_EXIT=0.

executionHistory.expansionReason: The active workflow runtime lacked the runSubagent tool, so bubbles.workflow parent-expanded the regression phase and re-ran the drift-detector suite directly.
executionHistory.note: Re-ran the lockstep drift-detector contract test this session (./smackerel.sh test unit --go --go-run 'ClientsDecoupling|ClientsBuildWorkflow|Manifest'): internal/deploy 12/12 GREEN, SCOPED_UNIT_EXIT=0, incl. the 6 spec-098 tests + 3 adversarial workflow-shape probes. The pre-existing build-clients contract (oras/cosign-keyless/repro/env-ref-secret) did not regress.

executionHistory.expansionReason: The active workflow runtime lacked the runSubagent tool, so bubbles.workflow parent-expanded the security phase and verified trust-boundary/supply-chain preservation directly.
executionHistory.note: Verified the CI trust boundary + supply chain are preserved against the live build.yml: TestClientsBuildWorkflow_AdversarialSshDeploy (no ssh/apply), _AdversarialCosignKey + _AdversarialNoCosign (cosign-keyless only), _AdversarialWallClock + _AdversarialMissingReproMarker (deterministic) all PASS. The release-gate only decides WHETHER build-clients runs; it adds no fallback and keeps the ANDROID_KEYSTORE_BASE64 fail-fast intact (NO-DEFAULTS / fail-loud SST).

executionHistory.expansionReason: The active workflow runtime lacked the runSubagent tool, so bubbles.workflow parent-expanded the spec-review phase and reviewed artifact coherence directly.
executionHistory.note: CURRENT: spec.md/design.md/scopes.md are coherent with the shipped f7148da2 diff. This session spec.md gained the Single-Capability Justification + design.md the Single-Implementation Justification (G094); scopes carry Scope-Kind ci-config/docs-only opt-outs (G040 Check 8) with extractable SCN-098-A01..A04 Gherkin + 1:1 DoD/Test-Plan/scenario-manifest traceability. No drift between planned and delivered.

executionHistory.expansionReason: The active workflow runtime lacked the runSubagent tool, so bubbles.workflow parent-expanded the simplify/gaps/harden/stabilize/chaos sweep; each is a no-op for this single additive CI-workflow gate, recorded in phaseStubs.
executionHistory.note: Quality sweep, all no-op for this single additive CI-workflow gate: simplify (no abstraction to collapse), gaps (every FR/scenario covered incl. 3 adversarial probes), harden (spec/design/scopes coherent + traceable), stabilize (deterministic static contract, no flakiness), chaos (the 3 adversarial workflow-shape sub-tests are the abuse probes). Recorded as phaseStubs.{simplify,gaps,harden,stabilize,chaos}.

executionHistory.expansionReason: The active workflow runtime lacked the runSubagent tool, so bubbles.workflow parent-expanded the audit phase and independently re-verified directly.
executionHistory.note: Independent re-verification: re-ran the scoped Go contract suite (12/12 GREEN), check (exit 0), lint (exit 0); independently inspected the live CI via gh run view. Finding: main build is RED at the FOREIGN build-images 'Trivy vulnerability scan -- smackerel-ml' step (run 27865311625), identical failure predating spec 098 (run 27856198803) — NOT caused by 098 (098 never touched build-images/Trivy). Because build-images fails upstream, build-clients/publish-build-manifest are skipped as failed-dependencies, so the live server-only-manifest path was not exercised; recorded honestly under Discovered Issues, NOT claimed confirmed. VERDICT: 098's contract is sound and independently proven in-repo; the foreign Trivy-ml failure is dispositioned as a separate concern. UPDATE 2026-06-22 (cosmetic CI-state reconciliation by bubbles.docs, text-only, does not alter this 2026-06-20 audit finding, status, or certification): the foreign Trivy-ml gate was remediated by commits 4debc4f0 + d684f7bc (merged to main); CI is now GREEN on HEAD (latest main build runs completed success, e.g. run 27925329084 on 2026-06-22), publish-build-manifest publishes the server-only manifest, and the server-only-manifest path is now exercised.

scopeProgress.name: Gate the client build on release intent + publish a server-only manifest
Document the server-only manifest contract + knb-gate expectation
